series_metadata.series_description: Published Ohio IT (Information Technology) policies, enterprise architecture, standards, bulletins, and proposed administrative rules filed with JCARR (Joint Committee on Agency Rule Review) - includes signature pages.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Upon publication, send copy to the State Library. Retain in office area for 5 years after it is superseded or rescinded, then have reviewed by State Archives. ; Paper: Upon publication, send copy to the State Library. Retain in office area for 5 years after it is superseded or rescinded, then have reviewed by State Archives., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
